reasoning: This workout targets your primary limiter, poor lactate clearance, by incorporating over-unders that simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop climb. Given your last ride's reduced intensity, we'll gradually build back up, focusing on improving aerobic base and fatigue resistance necessary for the climb from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6x(5 min 201W-218W, 3 min 242W-256W), 2 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
